Mostbet Aviator is a crash game where a virtual plane takes off and the multiplier climbs. The tension grows with every second: the higher the multiplier, the more you can win, but if the plane flies away first, the round is lost. Your task is to choose a cash-out moment that fits your risk level.

Mostbet Aviator ni mchezo wa crash ambapo ndege pepe huondoka na multiplier inapanda. Msisimko huongezeka kila sekunde: multiplier ikikua zaidi, unaweza kushinda zaidi, lakini ndege ikienda kwanza, raundi inapotea. Kazi yako ni kuchagua wakati wa Cash Out unaolingana na kiwango chako cha hatari.

Mostbet provides mobile apps so you can bet and play Aviator without a desktop. Android users can download the APK from the official site, while iOS users can install the app where available or use the mobile website.

Mostbet inatoa app za simu ili uweke dau na ucheze Aviator bila desktop. Watumiaji wa Android wanaweza kupakua APK kutoka tovuti rasmi, huku watumiaji wa iOS wakiweza kusakinisha app pale inapatopatikana au kutumia tovuti ya simu.
Android - download the APK from the official site, install it, and log in.
Android — pakua APK kutoka tovuti rasmi, usakinishe na uingie.
iOS - install the app where available or use the mobile website.
iOS — sakinisha app pale inapatopatikana au tumia tovuti ya simu.
The app gives access to the full account, deposits, withdrawals, and Aviator with real-time multipliers and cash-out buttons.
App inatoa ufikiaji wa akaunti kamili, amana, uondoaji na Aviator na multipliers za wakati halisi na vitufe vya Cash Out.
Mostbet operates under a licence from the Curaçao E-Gaming Licensing Agency, 8048/JAZ2016-065. Aviator runs on certified RNG-based software, so results are random from round to round.

Mostbet inafanya kazi chini ya leseni kutoka Curaçao E-Gaming Licensing Agency, 8048/JAZ2016-065. Aviator inaendeshwa kwa programu iliyothibitishwa inayotegemea RNG, kwa hiyo matokeo ni nasibu kutoka raundi hadi raundi.
Yes, the game has minimum and maximum bet limits visible in the interface; they are usually low enough for cautious play.
Ndiyo, mchezo una mipaka ya dau la chini na la juu inayoonekana kwenye kiolesura; kwa kawaida ni ya chini vya kutosha kwa uchezaji wa tahadhari.
Yes, you can use the mobile web version or desktop browser without installing the app.
Ndiyo, unaweza kutumia toleo la wavuti la simu au kivinjari cha desktop bila kusakinisha app.
Mostbet supports cryptocurrencies on many markets, alongside classic payment methods.
Mostbet inasaidia cryptocurrency kwenye masoko mengi, pamoja na njia za malipo za kawaida.
Mostbet operates under the Curaçao E-Gaming Licensing Agency, 8048/JAZ2016-065, and uses standard safeguards for fair gaming and security.
Mostbet inafanya kazi chini ya Curaçao E-Gaming Licensing Agency, 8048/JAZ2016-065, na inatumia ulinzi wa kawaida kwa uchezaji wa haki na usalama.
Responsible gaming: Independent platform. Play only where legal.
Uchezaji wenye uwajibikaji: Jukwaa huru. Cheza tu pale ambapo ni halali.

Mostbet Aviator est un jeu crash où un avion virtuel décolle et le multiplicateur monte. La tension monte à chaque seconde : plus le multiplicateur est élevé, plus vous pouvez gagner, mais si l’avion repart avant, la manche est perdue. Votre objectif est de choisir un moment de retrait adapté à votre niveau de risque.

Mostbet Aviator ezali lisano crash oyo avion virtuel e décoler mpe multiplicateur ekobaka. Tension ekobaka na seconde nionso : multiplicateur ya likolo, gain ya likolo ; soki avion e bima liboso, manche e perdue. Objectif na yo : kopona moment ya retrait oyo e correspondre na niveau ya risque na yo.
